headline: Second Life's 'Second Life,' You'll ReLove It
summary: Forget singularity. The future is circularity - or recommerce - fashion marketer Stella McCartney and eBay's Jamie Iannone told Cannes attendees this morning.

raw.headline: Second Life's 'Second Life,' You'll ReLove It
raw.summary: Forget singularity. The future is circularity - or recommerce - fashion marketer Stella McCartney and eBay's Jamie Iannone told Cannes attendees this morning.

headline: GameStop’s CEO just sacrificed a $35 billion pay package. Here’s how it could impact his effort to buy eBay
summary: Ryan Cohen has shared few details on how he'll move forward with his $56 billion offer for eBay since the company rejected the proposal in May.

raw.headline: GameStop’s CEO just sacrificed a $35 billion pay package. Here’s how it could impact his effort to buy eBay
raw.summary: Ryan Cohen has shared few details on how he'll move forward with his $56 billion offer for eBay since the company rejected the proposal in May.
